response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with a strong match to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB), recent AI-agent and MCP tooling work directly aligned with the role, and demonstrated breadth across backend, frontend, and DevOps with proven craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
strengths: Direct stack match with deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience
Recent AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work matches a key requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship and multi-language breadth
concerns: Limited explicit Kotlin experience for secondary backend services
Cloud experience shown for AWS but not GCP/Azure
